response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years experience requirement with 15+ years across full-stack roles, including current Staff-level work with TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) — a direct match for the stated stack and AI agent requirement. Strong fit on React, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, Git, and testing culture (TDD, workshops). Gaps in Nest.js and Vitest are minor given the breadth and depth of relevant experience.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack across TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker/Kubernetes
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP generators, agentic workflows)
Strong engineering-craft signal: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in stack
No explicit Kotlin experience; Java exposure is older (robotic arms era)

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of senior full-stack experience
